row.Description: TCC Benefits Administrator is a Charleston-based third-party administrator that has been operating since 1972. They specialize in administering self-funded and fully insured group health plans, offering services such as health reimbursement arrangements, flexible spending accounts, and medical management. TCC serves small and large employers with a focus on cost-saving health strategies and employee health benefits in South Carolina.

row.Description: The Ecchic Group is a cost-management team that assists small and mid-sized employers in obtaining low-cost group health insurance by leveraging medical, pharmaceutical, and insurance systems typically used by large employers. They focus on maintaining stable benefit and budget levels while helping clients accumulate cash surpluses and ensuring unhindered access to healthcare providers.

row.Description: ICHRA.com is a platform that provides businesses with the ability to offer Individual Coverage Health Reimbursement Arrangements (ICHRAs) to their employees. It allows employers to allocate a monthly allowance of tax-free money for employees to purchase health care services, addressing ACA compliance and offering flexibility in health benefits management. The platform serves businesses of all sizes, helping them control healthcare costs and offering employees the ability to choose personalized health plans.

row.Description: Triton Benefits & HR Solutions is a company that specializes in employee benefits and human resources services, offering solutions such as group health benefits, payroll services, and HR technology. They aim to assist businesses in navigating the complexities of employee benefits and HR management by providing strategy sessions, plan reviews, and leveraging market insights. Triton operates as a benefits broker, focusing on innovative solutions like telemedicine and self-funded plans to optimize healthcare costs for their clients.
